articles.title: Impeachment Suggested as Trump Attends TRUMP Coin Holder Dinner
articles.description: Jon Ossoff alleges possible Trump impeachment linked to TRUMP coin event. High-impact political and crypto market responses expected.

articles.title: Swiss National Bank Rejects Bitcoin Reserve Proposal
articles.description: The Swiss National Bank has rejected proposals to include Bitcoin in its reserves, pointing to stability and liquidity issues. Crypto advocates continue pushing for constitutional changes to recognize Bitcoin alongside gold.

articles.title: Trump's Memecoin Dinner Event Sparks Impeachment Call From Democratic Senator, Says POTUS Is Selling Access To Those Who Enrich Him
articles.description: Sen. Jon Ossoff (D-Ga. ) called for President Donald Trump’s impeachment on Friday for rewarding investors in his Official Trump (CRYPTO: TRUMP) meme coin with a gala dinner. read more

articles.title: XRP price prediction as world’s first spot ETF goes live
articles.description: Following the launch of the first spot XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF), two artificial intelligence (AI) models are predicting the asset could surpass $5 by the end of 2025. Brazil introduced the world’s first spot XRP product, XRPH11, which began trading on April 25 on B3, the country’s main stock exchange. Created by Hashdex and administered by Genial Investimentos, Genial Bank provides XRPH11’s custody services. After an extensive pre-operational phase, Hashdex secured approval from Brazil’s S
